heroHeadline: China Accelerates Antelope Reef as US Carriers Diverted; Balikatan 2026 Prep in Full Swing
heroSubtitle: Asia Times analysis (Apr 4) confirmed China is accelerating Antelope Reef construction in the Paracels while two US carrier strike groups are tied down in the Middle East and US SCS recon flights dropped ~30%. China formally warned the Philippines over EO 111 renaming of 131 Kalayaan Island Group features (Apr 2). US-Philippine joint air exercises launched Apr 6 as one of 500+ bilateral activities approved for 2026. Balikatan 2026 starts ~Apr 20 with Japan sending combat-capable JSDF units for the first time since WWII and NMESIS anti-ship missiles deployed to the Batanes Islands.
footerNote: Data sourced from CSIS AMTI, Philippine DFA/AFP/PCG, US Dept. of Defense, USNI News, Reuters, AP, South China Morning Post
